subcodes.first_line: The brocaded frontispiece of the Book of Divine Knowledge hath been adorned with the oneness of God, the Revealer of the Qur'an: There is none other God but Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد طرز دیباج کتاب العرفان بتوحید الله منزل الفرقان و هو انه لا اله الا هو
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
